title: The Psychology of Money
author: Morgan Housel
description: Timeless lessons on wealth, greed, and happiness.
zhDescription: 關於財富、貪婪與幸福的恆久課題。

title: Positive Psychology Progress: Empirical Validation of Interventions
zhTitle: 正向心理學的進展：介入措施的實證驗證
author: Martin E. P. Seligman, Tracy A. Steen, Nansook Park & Christopher Peterson
zhAuthor: 馬丁・塞利格曼、崔西・斯汀、朴南淑與克里斯多福・彼得森
description: A randomized controlled study of positive-psychology interventions and lasting happiness.
zhDescription: 以隨機對照研究檢驗正向心理學介入與持久幸福感。

title: The Red Book: Liber Novus
author: C. G. Jung
zhAuthor: 卡爾・古斯塔夫・榮格
description: Carl Gustav Jung's masterpiece on active imagination, the unconscious, and individuation.
zhDescription: 卡爾・榮格探討積極想像、潛意識與個體化歷程的深度心理學巨著。
